description_long: This chaise features a luxurious and ornate design, with a prominent use of polished white marble accented by intricate gold detailing. The backrest is tall and rectangular, adorned with a central medallion relief and flanked by two cylindrical gold rods extending horizontally. The seat is a long, slightly inclined platform with a rolled edge at the foot, constructed from a bronze or brass-like metal with decorative cutouts along the sides. The side panels are semi-circular and display a colorful mosaic pattern, adding a classical and regal touch. The legs are short and blocky, made from the same marble as the rest of the frame, providing a sturdy base. This piece exudes a sense of historical opulence, reminiscent of ancient Roman or Greek furniture, and would serve as a striking focal point in a public urban space such as a plaza or park.
description: An ornate marble and metal chaise with a tall, decorated backrest, mosaic side panels, and a rolled metal seat, evoking classical luxury.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, decorated backrest with gold relief and rods, and the full length of the rolled metal seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the semi-circular marble side panel with a colorful mosaic and the gold rods extending from the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full mosaic medallion on the backrest and the symmetrical marble construction.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the marble side panel, mosaic, and gold rods, with the seat's rolled edge visible.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, rectangular, and constructed from marble, featuring a central gold medallion relief and two horizontal gold rods. It is solid, with no visible segmentation, and is highly decorative with classical motifs.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present in the form of two horizontal gold rods extending from the upper sides of the backrest on both sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, blocky, and made from marble, integrated into the side panels for a sturdy, monolithic appearance. There are no visible decorative elements on the legs themselves.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible fabric upholstery; the seat is a solid metal surface with decorative cutouts and a rolled edge, while the side panels feature a geometric mosaic pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating surface is a continuous metal platform without any attached or loose cushions.
